hero_title:
Shaping the Future of IT Operations
Sanyou Technology
hero_subtitle: Integrating expertise from China, Japan, and Korea with advanced practices from Europe and America, delivering enterprise ITOM and AI-driven operational services.
symbol_text: The name "Sanyou" (Three Friends) represents the collaboration and friendship among China, Japan, and Korea in IT and AI. By leveraging the strengths of each nation and incorporating cutting-edge practices from Europe and America, we deliver world-class IT operations management solutions.
product_card_itom_desc: Unified monitoring for servers, networks, and cloud resources. Built-in automation workflows and AI anomaly detection. Multi-language support (JA / CN / KR / EN).
product_card_ops_desc: 24/7 managed services, cloud operations, and incident response. Expert teams safeguarding your systems.
product_card_ai_desc: Machine learning-based anomaly detection, predictive analytics, and auto-remediation. Extract insights from data and reduce operational burden.
product_card_tech_desc: Technical consulting, troubleshooting, and training services. Full lifecycle support for our products.
products_page_title_tri:
Unified Monitoring + Automation Platform
Tri-Force ITOM Suite
products_subtitle_tri: Supporting multi-cloud and hybrid environments. From visualization to auto-remediation, simplifying the entire IT operations workflow.
products_subtitle_aiobs: Leveraging machine learning to detect anomalies in advance and pinpoint root causes within seconds. Dramatically reducing operational team burden.
service_ops_desc: 24/7 infrastructure monitoring, cloud management, backup/restore, incident response and escalation.
service_ai_desc: Powered by AIObserver platform, providing anomaly detection, root cause analysis, capacity forecasting, and automated remediation policy design.
service_tech_desc: Standard (Email/Ticket, business day response), Advanced (Phone + emergency support), Premium (Dedicated technical manager + on-site support).
about_text: Founded in 2021, headquartered in Osaka, with joint innovation centers in Beijing and Seoul. Adopting ITIL/SRE frameworks, our multilingual and multicultural team delivers global services.
contact_desc: For any inquiries, please contact us via the following methods. (Email or phone)
service_header_subtitle: Professional IT management and AI-driven support services designed for enterprises.
about_slogan: Connecting Pan-Asian Innovation with Global Excellence.
about_heritage_text: Sanyou Technology was founded in 2021 with a vision to bridge the IT gap between China, Japan, and Korea. Our Osaka headquarters serves as a strategic hub, while innovation centers in Beijing and Seoul drive technical excellence.
about_methodology_text: We rigorously adhere to ITIL and SRE (Site Reliability Engineering) frameworks. By combining Western best practices with the unique needs of Asian markets, we deliver globally standardized and locally optimized solutions.
